productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Mark Rodeo Riveted Blue Shirts
description: CompositionLight blue shirt made of 100% cotton, has full arm cuff sleeves with a mid-sleeve buttoned flap, tipped collar with full front buttoned placket, stitch detailing along the curved hem, white and blue striped fabric inseam on the collar and branding on left chest FittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryFlaunt your style in this light blue shirt from wrangler – the brand that has been clothing the world since 1947. The full arm sleeves allow you to roll them up for a complete casual feel, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that perfect semi-formal look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
